name: dLazy Generate
description: All-in-one OpenClaw plugin that wraps the @dlazy/cli generation catalog. Exposes a single `dlazy_run` tool that can invoke any of the 69 dLazy models — image, video, audio, and composite pipelines (Veo 3.1, Seedance, Kling, Seedream, Suno, TTS, and more).

command.description: Path to the dlazy CLI binary. Defaults to 'dlazy' (must be on PATH).

apiKey.description: Optional dLazy API key. If set, exported as DLAZY_API_KEY for each call. Otherwise the CLI uses its own config (~/.dlazy/config.json) from `dlazy login`.

timeoutMs.description: Default per-call timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 300000 (5 min). Long video jobs can override per-call via the tool's timeoutSeconds parameter.
